{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240137199CA8B1FD03EAFDE235B5"}"},"total":62},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7536896303321170750","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错的种田萌娃文，很有吸引力，爱看！爱看！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754826774,"group_id":"7525654323041143832","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"闲看庭前花开花落，漫随天外云卷云舒。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6Kk+rzNTpams75WSKlqgv0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c0bd129b664f47dbb00e29d62fb33eed~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877187&x-signature=AaXtivaYp7oqLuYclZ12G9AXPBM%3D","user_id":"290733646954344","user_name":"半闲云"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"290733646954344","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7525654323041143832","book_info":{"abstract":"【种田】【养娃】【直播】【致富】【日常】【温馨】【治愈】
女儿的救命钱被女友卷走，苏阳绝望崩溃之际，突然成了老家桃源村的山神。
这都市牛马，谁爱当谁去当，我要回家种地养闺女。
成为山神，掌控一片山林，山中的一切尽归我有。
用山神之力催生出来的水果蔬菜，甘甜可口，营养丰富，都卖疯了，供不应求。
“一块钱一斤的桃子你卖五十，想钱想疯了吧。”
“一斤蔬菜三十块，谁买谁是傻子。”
“我是傻子，我就爱吃苏老板家的水果蔬菜，一天不吃我浑身难受。”
“苏老板，赶紧种菜呀，你这个年纪不努力奋斗，是怎么睡得着的。”
依靠山神之力，苏阳带领全村脱贫致富，走上人生巅峰。
远在他乡的前女友得知苏阳发财了，前来求和。
“哼，日落西山你不陪，东山再起你是谁？”
